source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/01_HAD1717MC(MG)/▶ CE MDD/인허가 준비 자료(초기)/18. Appendix (ce 인증 문서 작성 icmc)/Appendix 3. Risk Management/A-RMP-01 Risk Management Plan (en).docx

document.title: Risk Management Plan
authorityOrJurisdiction: Enforcement Regulations of the Medical Device Act

sourceSummary.oneLine: Risk management plan for H&abyz X-ray detector models HAD1717MG and HAD1717MC under CE MDD-related requirements.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Defines risk management scope, responsibilities, lifecycle activities, acceptability criteria, verification activities, and post-production information collection for the device.
keyPoints: The plan applies to statutory and specification requirements for X-ray detectors manufactured and sold by H&abyz Co., Ltd.
The document states that risk management elements specified in EN ISO 14971:2012 are to be carried out effectively.
The technical construction file supports CE marking for Solid state X-ray Imager products.
Risk management covers design, development, verification, validation, purchase, production, inspection, packing, shipping, after-sales service, and monitoring.
Post-production information sources include after-sales service logs, customer complaints, side effects reports, surveys, audits, inspections, and regulatory websites.

entities.name: H&abyz Co.,Ltd.
entities.evidence: The scope of this risk management plan applies to statutory and specification requirements required for the X-ray detector, which are manufactured and sold by H&abyz Co., Ltd.

entities.name: MFDS
entities.evidence: Korea's Medical Device Information - MFDS http://www.mfds.go.kr

entities.name: MHRA
entities.evidence: Europe's Medical Device Information - MHRA http://www.mhra.gov.uk

entities.name: FDA
entities.evidence: America's Medical Device Information - FDA http://www.fda.gov

entities.name: Development Team
entities.evidence: Development Team -Responsibility for overall risk management activites -Approval of risk management plan and risk management report

entities.name: Quality Management Team
entities.evidence: Quality Management Team -Identification of hazards in the development sector, risk assessment, risk assessment, risk control measures, residual risk assessment

concepts.name: Risk management
concepts.evidence: Risk management: Systematic application of management policies, procedures and practices to the tasks of analyzing, evaluating, controlling and monitoring risk

concepts.name: Risk management file
concepts.evidence: Risk management file: Set of records and other documents that are produced by risk management

concepts.name: Residual risk
concepts.evidence: Residual risk: Risk remaining after risk control measures has been taken

concepts.name: Risk acceptability
concepts.evidence: We can classify the risk as 2 categories 1. Broadly acceptable – Green Zone : Accept 2. Intolerable –Red Zone : N/Accept

concepts.name: Benefit analysis
concepts.evidence: If the residual risks are not permissible, a benefit analysis shall be conducted to determine whether to accept them.

concepts.name: Post-production information
concepts.evidence: The company shall gather post-production information in accordance with established quality management system procedures from various sources including after sales service log, customer complaints and side effects reports.

concepts.name: CE mark
concepts.evidence: requested to bear the CE mark to enable them to move freely within the European Community and to put into service in accordance with its intended purposes.

concepts.name: EN ISO 14971:2012
concepts.evidence: This procedure ensures that the entire elements of the risk management process specified in EN ISO14971:2012

evidence.claim: The document is a controlled Risk Management Plan with document number A-RMP-5-01.
evidence.evidenceText: Risk Management Plan Document No. A-RMP-5-01 Document Control Controlled

evidence.claim: The revision number is 0 and the revision history identifies the first edition dated 2019.6.13.
evidence.evidenceText: Revision No. Rev. Date Revision Description 0 2019.6.13 First edition

evidence.claim: The purpose is to identify hazards and minimize or eliminate potential risks or harms across the product life cycle.
evidence.evidenceText: The purpose of this procedure is to prevent the occurrence of any loss of or damage to body or property... by identifying hazards and minimizing or eliminating the potential risks or harms from the entire life cycle process

evidence.claim: The plan applies to X-ray detectors manufactured and sold by H&abyz Co., Ltd.
evidence.evidenceText: The scope of this risk management plan applies to statutory and specification requirements required for the X-ray detector, which are manufactured and sold by H&abyz Co., Ltd.

evidence.claim: The listed product models are HAD1717MG and HAD1717MC.
The product class is Class IIa.
The technical construction file relates to a Solid state X-ray Imager intended to bear the CE mark.
evidence.evidenceText: This technical construction file consists of documentation relating to product, Solid state X-ray Imager... requested to bear the CE mark
evidence.pageTarget: Solid state X-ray Imager CE marking

evidence.claim: The document cites Council Directive 93/42/EEC as amended by 2007/47/EC as a legal requirement.
evidence.evidenceText: Council Directive 93/42/EEC as amended by 2007/47/EC of 5 September 2007 concerning medical devices.

evidence.claim: The document identifies EN ISO 13485:2016 and EN ISO 14971:2012 among standard requirements.
evidence.evidenceText: EN ISO 13485: 2016 (Medical Device Quality Management System) EN ISO 14971: 2012 (Medical Device Risk Management)
evidence.pageTarget: Medical device quality and risk management standards

evidence.claim: Risk management applies through the entire product life cycle including design, production, inspection, shipping, and after-sales service.
evidence.evidenceText: This management plan applies the entire life cycle of the product, which includes Design Plan, Design & Development, Design Verification, Design Validation, Purchase, Production, Inspection, Packing & Shipping and after sales service.

evidence.claim: Residual risks in the Red Zone require comparison with medical device benefits.
evidence.evidenceText: If residual risks remain in Red Zone after taking risk control measures, the residual risks shall be compared with the benefits of the medical device.

evidence.claim: Post-production information is gathered from after-sales service logs, customer complaints, side effects reports, and customer satisfaction surveys.
evidence.evidenceText: The company shall gather post-production information... including after sales service log, customer complaints and side effects reports. In addition, sales personnel shall conduct customer satisfaction surveys

evidence.claim: The company monitors similar medical device and recall information using MFDS, MHRA, and FDA websites.
evidence.evidenceText: Checking similar medical devices in market and recall state... Korea's Medical Device Information - MFDS... Europe's Medical Device Information - MHRA... America's Medical Device Information - FDA

reviewFlags.reason: Source metadata authoritySignal is FDA, but the source text is primarily a CE MDD risk management plan and lists FDA only as an external medical device information website.
Revision Date field is not separately populated in the header; revision history provides Rev. Date 2019.6.13 for Revision No. 0.
Source text contains minor OCR or transcription quality issues such as misspellings in the severity table, but key regulatory facts remain readable.
